# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS = [
  /^https:\/\/deno\.land\/x\//,
  /^https:\/\/esm\.sh\//,
  /^https:\/\/cdn\.skypack\.dev\//,
];

const ALLOWED_MODULES_ENV = Deno.env.get("ALLOWED_MODULES") || "";
const allowedModules = new Set(
  ALLOWED_MODULES_ENV.split(",").filter((m) => m.trim())
);

const MAX_MODULES_PER_REQUEST = 5;
const MODULE_TIMEOUT_MS = 5000;

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

function isModuleAllowed(modulePath: string): boolean {
  if (allowedModules.has(modulePath)) {
    return true;
  }

  try {
    const url = new URL(modulePath);
    
    if (url.protocol !== "https:") {
      return false;
    }

    return ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(modulePath));
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function sanitizeModulePath(path: string): string {
  return path.trim().replace(/[<>'"]/g, "");
}

async function loadModuleWithTimeout(
  modulePath: string,
  timeout: number
): Promise<any> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeout);

  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    return module;
  } catch (error) {
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
    throw error;
  }
}

async function loadModules(configs: ModuleConfig[]): Promise<any> {
  if (configs.length > MAX_MODULES_PER_REQUEST) {
    throw new Error(
      `Too many modules requested. Maximum is ${MAX_MODULES_PER_REQUEST}`
    );
  }

  const results: Record<string, any> = {};
  const errors: Record<string, string> = {};

  for (const config of configs) {
    const sanitizedPath = sanitizeModulePath(config.path);

    if (!isModuleAllowed(sanitizedPath)) {
      errors[config.name] = "Module not allowed";
      continue;
    }

    try {
      const module = await loadModuleWithTimeout(
        sanitizedPath,
        MODULE_TIMEOUT_MS
      );
      results[config.name] = {
        loaded: true,
        exports: Object.keys(module),
      };
    } catch (error) {
      errors[config.name] = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error";
    }
  }

  return { results, errors };
}

async function executeModuleFunction(
  modulePath: string,
  functionName: string,
  args: any[]
): Promise<any> {
  const sanitizedPath = sanitizeModulePath(modulePath);

  if (!isModuleAllowed(sanitizedPath)) {
    throw new Error("Module not allowed");
  }

  const module = await loadModuleWithTimeout(sanitizedPath, MODULE_TIMEOUT_MS);

  if (typeof module[functionName] !== "function") {
    throw new Error(`Function ${functionName} not found in module`);
  }

  return await module[functionName](...args);
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: "ok" }), {
      headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/load-modules" && req.method === "POST") {
    try {
      const body = await req.json();
      const modules: ModuleConfig[] = body.modules || [];

      if (!Array.isArray(modules)) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: "modules must be an array" }),
          { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      }

      const result = await loadModules(modules);

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(result), {
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error",
        }),
        { status: 500, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/execute" && req.method === "POST") {
    try {
      const body = await req.json();
      const { modulePath, functionName, args = [] } = body;

      if (!modulePath || !functionName) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            error: "modulePath and functionName are required",
          }),
          { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
        );
      }

      const result = await executeModuleFunction(
        modulePath,
        functionName,
        args
      );

      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ result }), {
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error",
        }),
        { status: 500, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/load-from-query") {
    const modulePath = url.searchParams.get("module");

    if (!modulePath) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: "module query parameter required" }),
        { status: 400, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    try {
      const result = await loadModules([{ path: modulePath, name: "default" }]);

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(result), {
        headers: { "content-type": "application/json" },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error",
        }),
        { status: 500, headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/allowed-modules") {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        allowedModules: Array.from(allowedModules),
        patterns: ALLOWED_MODULE_PATTERNS.map((p) => p.toString()),
      }),
      { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      endpoints: [
        "POST /load-modules - Load multiple modules",
        "POST /execute - Execute a function from a module",
        "GET /load-from-query?module=<url> - Load module from query param",
        "GET /allowed-modules - List allowed modules",
        "GET /health - Health check",
      ],
    }),
    { headers: { "content-type": "application/json" } }
  );
}

serve(handler);
